title: The Real Difference Between Your Choices for Selling Ebooks Without Stripe — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan, you know how frustrating it is to sell ebooks online without access to Stripe or PayPal. The truth is, these payment processors exclude certain countries due to high-risk transaction rates, and sellers are left without a reliable way to get paid. This post will help you compare your options and find a solution that works for your business.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are popular choices for selling digital products, but they come with significant restrictions. PayPal, for example, blocks accounts from high-risk countries, while Stripe has a list of unsupported countries that includes Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan. Gumroad and Payhip may also restrict or block accounts from these regions. In contrast, Unchained Commerce offers a range of products, including the Core Shop Engine and Web3 Wallet Connect, that cater specifically to digital creators in restricted countries.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When it comes to handling restricted countries, the differences between these options become stark. PayPal and Stripe require extensive KYC verification and may freeze or block accounts without warning, while Gumroad and Payhip may restrict access to payment processing. In contrast, Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect allows buyers to pay with 300+ cryptocurrencies, eliminating the need for KYC and ensuring a seamless payment experience for sellers in restricted countries.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Payment speed, fees, and real costs are crucial factors to consider when choosing a platform. PayPal and Stripe charge high fees for international transactions, while Gumroad and Payhip may charge additional fees for certain payment methods. Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine, on the other hand, offers a flat fee structure with no hidden costs or subscription fees, ensuring that you keep more of your hard-earned revenue.
PayPal's restrictions on high-risk countries can freeze your account without warning.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

The risk of platform dependency is asymmetric in a specific way that most creators underestimate. When PayPal or Stripe is working, everything seems fine. When it stops working — through suspension, policy change, or geographic restriction enforcement — you lose access to your revenue channel instantly, often with funds already inside the platform that you cannot withdraw. Rebuilding on a new platform takes weeks. The income gap during that period is real money lost. Crypto-native infrastructure removes this asymmetric risk. Your wallet cannot be suspended. Your GitHub Pages store cannot be taken down by a payment platform's compliance team. The infrastructure is under your control from day one, which means no single external decision can cut off your income.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

Ultimately, the choice between these options depends on your specific situation and needs. If you're a digital creator in a restricted country, Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect and Core Shop Engine offer a reliable and seamless way to sell ebooks and other digital products online. If you're a solo developer building a crypto-native digital product store, Unchained Commerce's products can help you create a scalable and secure infrastructure for your business.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine offers a flat fee structure with no hidden costs or subscription fees.
